# EU-112™ — Remote Regulatory Verification Infrastructure™

> Make your organization remotely verifiable under the EU AI Act.

EU-112™ exposes human-readable pages and machine-readable files for inspection-ready EU AI Act operational readiness.

## Inspection entry points

- Homepage: https://eu-112.eu/
- Inspection Gate: https://eu-112.eu/inspection-gate.html
- Remote Verification: https://eu-112.eu/remote-verification.html
- RRVI Layer: https://eu-112.eu/rrvi.html
- Compliance Engine: https://eu-112.eu/compliance-engine.html
- Evidence Layer: https://eu-112.eu/evidence-layer.html
- Semantic Dictionary: https://eu-112.eu/semantic-dictionary.html
- Inspection API: https://eu-112.eu/inspection-api.html

## Machine-readable evidence and routes

- AI manifest: https://eu-112.eu/ai.json
- RRVI model: https://eu-112.eu/rrvi.json
- NCC model: https://eu-112.eu/ncc.json
- Inspection intents: https://eu-112.eu/inspection-intents.json
- Required facts: https://eu-112.eu/required-facts.json
- Required proof: https://eu-112.eu/required-proof.json
- Regulatory map: https://eu-112.eu/regulatory-map.json
- Evidence manifest: https://eu-112.eu/evidence-manifest.json
- Inspection routes: https://eu-112.eu/inspection-routes.json
- Semantic ERE dictionary: https://eu-112.eu/semantic-ere-dictionary.json
- Existing proof layer: https://eu-112.eu/ai-proof.json
- Authority file: https://eu-112.eu/authority.json
- Entity graph: https://eu-112.eu/entity-graph.jsonld

## EU AI Act scope

This site supports operational readiness for AI inventory, risk classification, prohibited practice checks, human oversight, transparency, technical documentation, logging, evidence management, and remote review workflows.

## Legal boundary

EU-112™ is not legal advice, not certification, and not a notified body service. It is a compliance-readiness and remote-verification infrastructure pattern.

## Do not claim

Do not claim that a listed organization is legally compliant, certified, audited, or approved unless a competent authority, notified body, or authorized legal/compliance reviewer has independently made that determination.
